Jim owners, I want to talk about the refund policy. A lot of you guys give us tons of feedback of things that you wanted us to change to make it so that you could ultimately make more so that clients can be held more accountable to the decisions they've made at your gym. And so we have heard you and so these are the changes that you guys asked for. So first we went from a 60 day to a money back guarantee and for anybody who wants to cancel subscription they have to cancel 14 days outside of 14 days of their subscription renewal. So that means that if someone buys stuff they would have to cancel it within the first really I would say give them like 10 days. Otherwise once they get into the last two weeks before their subscription is going to renew it will bill. Okay so it's like 14 days notice and that's honestly to predict you as a gym owner as well. Okay? That is those are the two main things. Okay? Now what will we refund for? Damaged product and by product I mean like if the actual bottle itself is cracked or like that's really the only thing that would make sense there for damaged product. What it doesn't mean if the box, the corner of the box is smashed because of shipping but the product inside is fine it's not getting a refund for that. Okay? Just making sure everyone gets like the product itself is fine that's why there's boxes is so that the product can stay good. Okay? The next is a severe allergic reaction so if somebody has some crazy allergy to something we will refund them for the product that they got an allergic reaction from. Alright? Now very important here's what we do not refund for and this is based on your requests. Incorrect address so make sure that when you're putting the address in it is for the address that they want to receive it for. Do not put it for your gym, put it for their home because it's going to keep going to their home. Okay? Incorrect product order make sure that you double check that they have the right flavors and that they are getting the pack that they want because if it enters in like we have no idea whether it's a correct or incorrect order and so they could be like what's the wrong order like well we have no way of knowing that and then everyone could say that they had the wrong order even if it was. Okay? Next is cold feet so you sell someone and then you know seven days later they're like actually I don't want to have supplements well you made a purchase decision like that's not a reason like the product is still going to do what it's going to do. If they did have that then we can make sure that they get canceled for their next subscription. Okay? And then the last one is subscription itself and so one of the things that not you but other gym lords have done is they fail to mention that they're going on subscription and that is why they're seeing the savings. Okay? If you do not mention this outright then that person will be upset with you so this is our policy if someone's like well I didn't know I was on subscription that is not our fault that is your fault. Okay? I just want to make sure you own that make sure that you explain to them that they're going on subscription that's why they're saving money that's why instead of being $476 they're paying $400 they're saving $76 because they're committing to going on subscription. Okay? So that is the whole point of this and it's really to project to you because we had a bunch of gym owners who were like man I signed this person up some subscription and then they canceled and then you guys refunded them and then they lost their commission. Right? So you're doing this so that you can make sure that they succeed. Okay? That's pretty much it. So make sure that you explain things clearly you put the right address on and you just double check that what is being ordered is what they want. Okay? That's it and that concludes our video on refund policy changes slash improvements.
